Package org.apache.juneau.http.header

Class ContentRange.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.header.ContentRange.Builder
Enclosing class:
ContentRange
public static class ContentRange.Builder extends Object
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Content-Range header value.

Composes the three fields defined by RFC 7233 §4.2 — the range unit (default bytes), the resolved first-last byte range (or * for an unsatisfied range), and the complete-length (or * when unknown) — into forms such as bytes 0-1023/2048, bytes 0-1023/*, and bytes */2048.

Example:

String value = ContentRange.create() .range(0, 1023) .length(2048) .build(); // => "bytes 0-1023/2048"

See Also:
  • ContentRange
  • RFC 7233 - HTTP/1.1 Range Requests
Since:
10.0.0

    ContentRange.Builder

    Sets the range unit (default bytes).
    ContentRange.Builder
    unknownLength()
    Marks the complete length as unknown, rendering it as *.

    unsatisfiedRange()
    Marks the range portion as unsatisfied, rendering it as * (used with a known complete length).

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder()

  • Method Details

    • unit

      public ContentRange.Builder unit(String value)
      Sets the range unit (default bytes).
      Parameters:
      value - The range unit. Must not be null or blank.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If value is null or blank.

    • range

      public ContentRange.Builder range(long startValue, long endValue)
      Sets the resolved first-last byte range.

      Clears any previously-set unsatisfied marker.

      Parameters:
      startValue - The first byte position (inclusive). Must be non-negative.
      endValue - The last byte position (inclusive). Must be greater than or equal to startValue.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the positions are negative or out of order.

    • unsatisfiedRange

      public ContentRange.Builder unsatisfiedRange()
      Marks the range portion as unsatisfied, rendering it as * (used with a known complete length).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • length

      public ContentRange.Builder length(long value)
      Sets the complete-length (the total size of the representation).

      Clears any previously-set unknown-length marker.

      Parameters:
      value - The complete length in units. Must be non-negative.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If value is negative.

    • unknownLength

      public ContentRange.Builder unknownLength()
      Marks the complete length as unknown, rendering it as *.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public String build()
      Builds the rendered Content-Range header value.
      Returns:
      The header value. Never null.

    • toHeader

      public ContentRange toHeader()
      Builds a ContentRange header bean directly from this builder.
      Returns:
      A ContentRange carrying build(). Never null.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
